lines.speaker: Nova
lines.text: Greetings, iknami. It's good to see so many who are willing to contribute to the Final Dawn. The word of the Augur has changed everything. The time to act is now.

lines.speaker: Nova
lines.text: You have not heard? She is the one who now leads the Emissaries. She has taken this once helpless collective and turned them into the ones who will guide us all to Mokhaiotl.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you know all this? You're not even a member yet.

lines.speaker: Nova
lines.text: I was once. In my time of need, I turned to the Emissaries, but they were even more helpless than I was.

lines.speaker: Nova
lines.text: Now though, she has changed everything. Now it is my duty to rejoin their ranks so that we may bring about the Final Dawn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks for the information.
